Given an angle at the circumference is 28°. The angle at the center subtended by the same arc is x. Find x.
John was facing South 35° East. He turned 90° anticlockwise. Find his new direction.
Solve the system: 2x - 3y = -1, 3x + 2y = 3. Find 13(y - x).
An equilateral triangle has a side of 2 cm. Find the height of the triangle.
A number is selected at random from 40 to 50 inclusive. Find the probability it is prime.

If the probability of an event happening is 0.65, what is the probability it does not happen?
